noise_bank.independence: fixed across the three selected-arm endpoint comparison checkpoints

profile.caption: disjoint raw temperature-1 M=50/gamma confirmation holdout
profile.name: v3_support_holdout_m50

recipe.acquisition_memory: round 1: verified-positive pretrained calibration seed; later rounds: at most 512 full-H positives from the current and previous 1 rounds, selected without replacement by round_gamma_replica_context; re-embedded with current phi; frozen within round
recipe.artifact_profile_description: omit final DStore; retain checkpoints at the declared compact interval and training-viz rounds 1..10/every10; probe, calibration, and completion hashes remain complete
recipe.beta_protocol: round-1 operational calibration followed after every round by a beta-neutral current-policy calibration targeting median ESS=0.5; beta_n is frozen during round n

calibration_budget.enters_round1_GP: exactly the declared operational_gp_size seed positives

recipe.calibration_limitation: beta is solved on beta-neutral random pending orders; realized first-step ESS/K and stage-normalized ESS/M_remaining are logged during expansion
recipe.calibration_scope: round-0 acquisition-only verifier budget; the seed archive supplies the declared round-1 GP but neither archive enters cumulative training D+ or audit
recipe.demo_buffer_isolation: authenticated TRAIN reference never enters D/D+, RBF GP, beta, acquisition, verifier counts, execution, or raw evaluation
recipe.demo_objective_semantics: L=(1-demo_frac)*L_pos + demo_frac*L_demo; both source losses independently normalized; no update when W2 D+ is empty
recipe.execution: nominal_hp_max_step_margin; execution-verified (full-H or certified goal prefix) and, for nominal_hp rules, the first executed state satisfies the nominal SafeMPPI DTCBF level-set condition; NVP terminates; no expert/fallback
recipe.gradient_clip_semantics: the declared replay measure defines the pre-clip objective; existing global gradient clipping is then applied and its active-step fraction is logged
recipe.learning_memory: hierarchically round/gamma/replica/context/query-interleaved replay over full-H positives from the current and previous 1 rounds; cumulative D+ archive is retained
recipe.lengthscale_protocol: declared multiplier times the mean pairwise embedding distance of exactly 50 samples from the pretrained model
recipe.methodological_scope: task-specific peptide-style RBF AFE adaptation; previous-round cap and parallel frozen acquisition are explicit computational assumptions
recipe.negative_alpha_semantics: paper gradient-norm target: g = g_pos - rho*g_neg, rho=alpha*||g_pos||/||g_neg||; alpha=0 is exact positive-only update
recipe.negative_population: all successfully observed B queries at a terminal NVP context from the same replay window; this task-specific closed-loop viability signal may overlap full-H D+ and excludes SOCP errors
recipe.optimizer_draw_interpretation: exactly |eligible D+| unique positive draws; all positives appear once; macro-batches are balanced by hierarchical loss mass and each macro-batch causes exactly one Adam update
recipe.outcome_evaluation: not produced by the trainer; stored checkpoints require a separate raw, untilted temperature-1 evaluation
recipe.parallel_sampling: 8 closed-loop replicas per gamma advanced synchronously; one GPU proposal batch per control tick; 128 persistent spawned CPU verifier workers; no within-round GP update
recipe.reference_code_semantics: sequential Schur complements are the B<K budget-consistent adaptation of the public peptide implementation's batch-conditional covariance
recipe.replay_loss_measure: equal nested mass over active positive-support gamma, (round, episode), context, and positive query; all eligible positives remain in the exact epoch; a size-b minibatch in an S-step epoch applies weight b*S*mu_q before clipping
recipe.replay_loss_measure_limitation: gamma/episode/context groups with zero eligible full-H positives cannot carry positive CFM mass and are logged as missing support

route_diagnostics.mode_definition: U/R is the sign of plan-endpoint cross-track displacement from the oriented canonical start-goal line; ambiguous values are retained

profile.description: Endpoint-matched giant-obstacle OOD task: replace the four central radius-0.2 disks by one radius-1.0 disk at (2.5,2.5).
profile.name: low7_radius1_canonical_v1

recipe.uncertainty_meaning: RBF posterior variance conditioned on the acquisition buffer and only the locations already selected within the same B-budget query; not validity probability and not a safety certificate
recipe.update: positive-only gamma/episode/context/query equal-mass CFM lr 1e-05; one exact W2 D+ epoch partitioned into exactly 32 mass-balanced macro Adam updates; demo objective mass 0.25; alpha 0, no prox

profile.description: Endpoint-matched giant-obstacle OOD task: replace the four central radius-0.2 disks by one radius-1.0 disk at (2.5,2.5).
profile.name: low7_radius1_canonical_v1
